description: Master KP Astrology Planet Combinations Configuration

items.description: Indicates professional activities in independent business leading to regular gains

notes.meaning: Active independent business or commercial trade with high financial satisfaction and expansion.
notes.typicalEvent: Launch of a new business venture or receipt of a major commercial contract.
notes.supportingEvidence: Strong placements of Mercury and Jupiter in connection to the 10th and 11th cusps.
notes.possibleConflicts: 6th house activation indicating heavy service-sector requirements or debt focus.
notes.futureKPExtensions: Sub-sub lord connectivity mapping to planetary sign lords of 2nd and 7th houses.

items.description: Indicates financial inflow through public dealings, commercial partnerships, and trade

notes.meaning: Partnership creation or capital expansion through public client dealings.
notes.typicalEvent: Signing a partnership agreement or securing major regular commercial accounts.

notes.possibleConflicts: 12th house involvement leading to foreign cash-drain or partner disputes.
notes.futureKPExtensions: Using ruling planets at the time of agreement to verify the partnership's longevity.

items.description: The ultimate combination for massive mercantile wealth, successful business setups, and major commercial trade

notes.meaning: High-tier business growth, commercial market domination, and regular wealth generation.

notes.possibleConflicts: 6th house activation forcing litigation, or 12th house causing stock/capital write-offs.

items.description: Indicates career choices aligned with independent commerce rather than service

items.description: Brings strong professional accolades, growth, and cash gains through employment

notes.meaning: A happy marriage that fulfills major life wishes and brings luck.
notes.typicalEvent: Successful, happy marriage or engagement.
notes.supportingEvidence: 11th cuspal sub-lord signifying the 7th house and Venus.
notes.possibleConflicts: 10th house (negation of 11) dasha causing temporary delays.
notes.futureKPExtensions: Sub-lord level calculation of matrimonial harmony indices.

items.description: Indicates marriage bringing sudden joint asset gains, inheritance, or in-law wealth

notes.meaning: A marriage bringing major financial/property gains through the spouse or spouse's family.
notes.typicalEvent: Marriage followed by receipt of inherited property or spouse's wealth.
notes.supportingEvidence: 7th cuspal sub-lord signifying the 8th house.
notes.possibleConflicts: 6th house active dasha causing marriage friction alongside financial gains.
notes.futureKPExtensions: Cuspal sub-lord star lord linkage in KP.

items.description: Indicates promotion to high executive status combined with substantial salary increments

notes.meaning: Sustained increase in corporate power and base salary package.
notes.typicalEvent: Title upgrade to Vice President or Director with high salary raise.
notes.supportingEvidence: 10th cuspal sub-lord signifying 2nd house and unafflicted by 5th house.
notes.possibleConflicts: 9th house activation, negating the 10th and causing a sudden role shift.
notes.futureKPExtensions: Stellar connection of Sun/Mars with 10th sub-lord.

items.description: Indicates promotion bringing exceptional financial bonuses and cash gains

notes.meaning: Career promotion focusing heavily on stock option grants and financial bonuses.
notes.typicalEvent: Securing a promotion with substantial performance bonus structures.
notes.supportingEvidence: 11th cuspal sub-lord signifying 2nd house.
notes.possibleConflicts: 12th house causing immediate investments or high initial taxes.
notes.futureKPExtensions: Stellar linkage of Jupiter on the 11th cusp sub-lord.

items.description: The gold standard for rapid corporate career promotions, title upgrades, and high recognition

notes.meaning: Outstanding corporate recognition, leading to rapid promotions and major achievements.
notes.typicalEvent: Selection for a highly competitive executive leadership promotion.
notes.supportingEvidence: 10th and 11th cuspal sub-lords in mutual star linkage, aspected by Jupiter.
notes.possibleConflicts: 5th house dasha periods which are 8th from the 10th, bringing promotion blocks.
notes.futureKPExtensions: Refined transit overlays of Saturn and Jupiter over exact cuspal degrees.

items.description: Indicates promotion within service involving managing larger teams and responsibilities

notes.meaning: Significant increase in professional duties and organizational authority.
notes.typicalEvent: Promotion to a manager or department supervisor role.
notes.supportingEvidence: 6th cuspal sub-lord signifying the 10th house.
notes.possibleConflicts: 5th house (negation of 6th) causing service disruptions or team losses.

items.description: Indicates investments in land, real estate, or housing assets increasing overall wealth

notes.meaning: Asset accumulation through real estate investments and land acquisitions.
notes.typicalEvent: Purchasing land or a residential house.
notes.supportingEvidence: 4th cuspal sub-lord signifying the 2nd house.
notes.possibleConflicts: 3rd house dasha (negating 4th) causing property sales or loss of land.
notes.futureKPExtensions: Sub-lord level analysis of Mars as the natural property planet.

items.description: The ultimate signature for successful purchases of luxury real estate, commercial land, and homes

notes.meaning: Extremely lucky and profitable real estate transactions, leading to wealth expansion.
notes.typicalEvent: Registration of a premium villa, luxury home, or high-value commercial land.
notes.supportingEvidence: 4th and 11th cuspal sub-lords connected to 2nd house, with Mars as the main signifyer.
notes.possibleConflicts: 3rd house (negator of 4th) or 8th house causing legal registration obstacles.
notes.futureKPExtensions: Hourly transit triggers for the exact time of signing property deeds.

items.description: Indicates fulfilling life desires through real estate ownership and home gains

notes.meaning: Successful and happy real estate ownership and peaceful domestic life.

notes.possibleConflicts: 3rd house active periods causing relocations and selling properties.
notes.futureKPExtensions: Stellar-level transit analysis of Mars over the 4th cusp.

items.description: Indicates creative intelligence directed at secret, hidden, or occult subjects

items.description: Indicates traveling with the intention of relocating your home to another place
